process.title: AI Discovery
process.description: We assess your current AI maturity, data assets, team capability, and business goals. This gives us a clear baseline — what you have, what gaps exist, and where AI can unlock the most value quickly and sustainably.

process.title: Strategy & Roadmap
process.description: We define your AI vision and prioritise use cases by business impact and feasibility. You receive a vendor-agnostic roadmap with clear milestones, investment levels, and expected outcomes — aligned to your organisation's appetite and constraints.

process.title: Architecture Design
process.description: We design the AI architecture: agent frameworks, data platforms, model selection, integration patterns, and infrastructure. We present multiple options with trade-offs, costs, and timelines so you make the decision with full information.

process.title: Proof of Concept
process.description: Before committing to full delivery, we build targeted POCs to validate the architecture and demonstrate value to stakeholders. This de-risks the investment and surfaces any technical constraints early, before they become expensive.

process.title: Full Implementation
process.description: We deliver production-ready AI solutions with an emphasis on quality, security, observability, and scalability. Our team covers the full stack — data engineering, model integration, APIs, UI, and cloud infrastructure — so nothing falls through the gaps.

process.title: Enablement & Handover
process.description: We upskill your team, document the architecture and runbooks, and ensure you are operationally ready before we step back. Our goal is your independence — not dependency on us. We leave you capable and confident to own what we built together.
